options.error: Commit message must follow Conventional Commits format: <type>(<scope>): <description>

actions.action: files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- '*.php'); if [ -n "$files" ]; then echo "$files" | while IFS= read -r file; do php -l "$file" || exit 1; done; fi
echo '🔒 Scanning for secrets...' && gitleaks protect --staged --verbose --redact --config=.gitleaks.toml
echo 'Running Pint style check...' && composer lint:pint
echo 'Running PHPCS structural checks...' && composer lint:phpcs
echo 'Running PHPStan static analysis...' && composer lint:phpstan

echo '🔒 Scanning commits for secrets...' && gitleaks detect --verbose --redact --config=.gitleaks.toml --log-opts="origin/main..HEAD" || echo 'Note: Gitleaks scan of unpushed commits (install gitleaks: brew install gitleaks)'
